summary: Frontend verification of 3 new features in Maestro EGP POS (Arabic RTL): (1) POS sync indicator buttons, (2) delivery report Collect-All flow, (3) collections log per-branch breakdown. POS page loads cleanly with pending-orders-btn visible; sync-now-btn/unsynced-count-badge correctly hidden when no offline orders (expected). Delivery report Collect-All happy-path WORKS end-to-end: tab switch to التوصيل, collect-all-btn renders with correct count+amount (تحصيل الكل (2) — 32,275 IQD), dialog opens with both companies (توترز 19,975, طلبات 12,300, total 32,275), receiver input + confirm fires POST and the collect-all-btn disappears (because remaining→0). Toast not detected via selector and collections-log-table couldn't be expanded by clicking the heading; the toggle is the يellow 'عرض السجل' button (data-testid not exposed). Per-branch breakdown therefore not visually confirmed but the flow that produces it succeeded.

ui_bugs.issue: The 'عرض السجل' button that expands data-testid=collections-log-table has no data-testid; testers/automation cannot deterministically open the log. Heading text 'سجل التحصيلات' is not clickable.

After confirm-collect-all the success toast was not detectable via [data-sonner-toast]/[role=status]/li[data-state]. Either the toast lives elsewhere in the DOM or it fades faster than a 7s wait. Verify a toast actually fires on success.

Before confirming a fresh collect-all, top KPI cards showed 'تم التحصيل: 32,275' AND 'المتبقي للتحصيل: 32,275' simultaneously, and per-company rows showed both 'تم التحصيل' and 'المتبقي' equal to the full net. This indicates a stale/double-count display before the new collection. After confirm the collect-all button correctly disappears, but verify whether the report cleanly refreshes (تم=net, متبقي=0) without leaving doubled values.

action_items: Add data-testid (e.g., collections-log-toggle) to the 'عرض السجل' button so automation can open the collections log and verify data-testid=collection-branches-{id} per-branch breakdown.
Verify success toast is rendered (sonner Toaster present at app root) after successful /api/reports/delivery/collect call and that confirm-collect-all triggers it.
Re-check delivery KPI/company-row math after collect-all: ensure 'تم التحصيل' = collected, 'المتبقي' = remaining (and not both showing the same net amount).
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is >3600 lines – split DeliveryReportTab and other large tab subcomponents into separate files for maintainability.

Radix Tabs triggers do not respond to synthetic pointer events / coordinate clicks in headless runs; only Playwright's locator.click() switched the tab. Not a product bug, but worth knowing for any e2e tooling.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed (توترز 15%, طلبات 18%) in May 2026 window 2026-05-01 → 2026-05-31.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To trigger the delivery tab in Reports.js use Playwright's locator click: page.locator('button[role="tab"]', has_text='التوصيل').first.click() AFTER clicking the page body once to clear date-input focus. mouse.click on bounding box and JS pointer dispatch do NOT switch Radix Tabs in this env. Then set date range 2026-05-01 → 2026-05-31. To open the collections log click the yellow button labelled 'عرض السجل' (no testid currently). Collect-All happy path confirmed working; remaining verification: success toast + per-branch breakdown after opening the log.
rca of the issue: N/A - features working as designed. Only missing data-testid on the log toggle prevented full verification of the per-branch breakdown.
